# FreeReign

> FreeReign is a free, client-side CSS toolkit with 25 visual code generators. Developers use it to build CSS gradients, box shadows, glassmorphism effects, flexbox layouts, grid layouts, animations, and more — then copy the generated CSS, SCSS, or Tailwind code directly into their projects. No signup, no install, no data collection. Everything runs in the browser.

## What FreeReign Does

FreeReign replaces the need to have multiple CSS generator tabs open. It provides 25 interactive tools in one interface, each with visual controls, a live preview, and instant code output. The generated code is formatted to look human-written — proper indentation, sensible shorthand, and real variable names.

## Tools (25 total)

### Free Tools (10)
- [Gradient Generator](https://freereign.dev/tools/gradient): Linear, radial, and conic CSS gradients with multiple color stops
- [Box Shadow Generator](https://freereign.dev/tools/boxshadow): Multi-layer shadows with inset, blur, spread, and opacity controls
- [Border Radius Generator](https://freereign.dev/tools/borderradius): Per-corner control with unit switching (px, %, em, rem)
- [Color Palette Generator](https://freereign.dev/tools/colorpalette): 6 harmony modes — analogous, complementary, triadic, split-complementary, tetradic, monochromatic
- [Glassmorphism Generator](https://freereign.dev/tools/glassmorphism): Frosted glass effects with backdrop-filter blur and saturation
- [Flexbox Playground](https://freereign.dev/tools/flexbox): Visual flexbox layout builder with all container and item properties
- [CSS Grid Generator](https://freereign.dev/tools/grid): Grid layout builder with template columns, rows, and gap controls
- [Animation Builder](https://freereign.dev/tools/animation): Keyframe animation creator with 6 presets and custom timing
- [Text Shadow Generator](https://freereign.dev/tools/textshadow): Multi-layer text shadow effects with typography controls
- [Neumorphism Generator](https://freereign.dev/tools/neumorphism): Soft UI effects with flat, concave, convex, and pressed states

### Pro Tools (15 — $14.99 one-time)
- [Transform Generator](https://freereign.dev/tools/transform): 3D rotations, scale, translate, skew with perspective
- [Transition Builder](https://freereign.dev/tools/transition): Visual transition editor with 11 easing presets
- [Clip-Path Generator](https://freereign.dev/tools/clippath): 16 shape presets with custom polygon support
- [CSS Filter Generator](https://freereign.dev/tools/filter): 9-property filter chain builder
- [Type Scale Calculator](https://freereign.dev/tools/typography): Modular typography scales using 8 musical ratios
- [CSS Variables System](https://freereign.dev/tools/variables): Complete custom properties system with color scales
- [Breakpoint Tester](https://freereign.dev/tools/breakpoint): Responsive viewport testing with 9 device presets
- [Aspect Ratio Calculator](https://freereign.dev/tools/aspectratio): Responsive aspect-ratio with 9 presets
- [Scroll Snap Builder](https://freereign.dev/tools/scrollsnap): Scroll snap container builder with snap type and alignment
- [Cursor Styles Preview](https://freereign.dev/tools/cursor): All 35 CSS cursor values with live preview
- [Container Query Builder](https://freereign.dev/tools/containerquery): Component-level responsive designs
- [Gradient Text Generator](https://freereign.dev/tools/gradienttext): Animated gradient text effects
- [Fluid Typography Calculator](https://freereign.dev/tools/fluidtype): Responsive font sizes using CSS clamp()
- [Custom Scrollbar Styler](https://freereign.dev/tools/scrollbar): WebKit scrollbar styling with visual controls
- [Media Query Builder](https://freereign.dev/tools/mediaquery): Visual @media query builder with modern syntax

## Technical Details
- Built with vanilla JavaScript (ES modules), zero runtime dependencies
- Vite build system, ~43KB gzipped total
- 100% client-side — no server calls, no cookies, no tracking
- Output formats: CSS, SCSS, Tailwind
- Keyboard shortcuts: / to search, arrow keys to navigate, Ctrl+S to download
